# Filters and Convolution (Fixed Kernels) {#sec-07-filters-convolution}

::: {.callout-warning}
**Chapter stub.** This chapter is planned but not yet written. The abstract below is its
contract; drafting sources are listed for provenance.
:::

*Before learning, engineering: Sobel edges, blurs, sharpeners. Convolution as structured, weight-shared linear maps — translation equivariance for free. Open with the Chapter 1 callback: a filter response is the dot-product similarity score of @sec-01-linear-regression, slid across the image — the template is just still hand-made.*

<!-- draft-sources
seeds:
- `sources/4.1-CNN.tex (convolution sections)`
transcripts:
- `m04_lecture-4-convolutional-neural-networks-cnns_s6xDEvdz3tY.txt`
-->
